title: CTOV - Paragliders compat
description: Compatibility datapack between CTOV and Paragliders mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Paragliders. You will find some goddess statue in the villages. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Paragliders mod**

Paragliders mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paragliders)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
